1	# crew-mcp
2	
3	> v2 of [crew](https://github.com/chasenstark/crew). An MCP server +
4	> portable captain skill that turns any AI coding CLI (Claude Code,
5	> Codex, Gemini) into the orchestrator of a worktree-isolated
6	> multi-agent crew.
7	
8	**Status: pre-release (v0.2.0-dev).** Installable from source. Eval +
9	field report (M4) is the remaining v0.2 milestone.
10	
11	## What this is
12	
13	v0.1 of crew was a Terminal UI hosting its own captain LLM that
14	dispatched to Claude Code / Codex / Gemini as workers. v2 inverts
15	the architecture: crew-mcp is an MCP server you install into your
16	existing AI coding CLI, plus a captain skill that ships with it.
17	The host CLI's LLM becomes the captain; crew provides the
18	orchestration verbs and the playbook.
19	
20	See:
21	
22	- [docs/plans/mcp-pivot/PRODUCT_VISION.md](./docs/plans/mcp-pivot/PRODUCT_VISION.md) — the why
23	- [docs/plans/mcp-pivot/IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md](./docs/plans/mcp-pivot/IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md) — the how
24	- [docs/plans/mcp-pivot/HISTORICAL_CONTEXT.md](./docs/plans/mcp-pivot/HISTORICAL_CONTEXT.md) — what came before
25	
26	## Install (from source)
27	
28	```sh
29	git clone <this repo>
30	cd crew-mcp
31	npm install
32	npm run build
33	npm link
34	
35	# Install into one or more host CLIs
36	crew-mcp install --target codex          # ~/.codex/config.toml + ~/.codex/prompts/crew.md
37	crew-mcp install --target claude-code    # ~/.claude.json + ~/.claude/skills/crew/SKILL.md
38	crew-mcp install --target gemini         # ~/.gemini/settings.json + ~/.gemini/extensions/crew/SKILL.md
39	crew-mcp install --target all            # auto-detects installed hosts
40	
41	# Verify the install (skill ↔ MCP tool surface parity)
42	crew-mcp verify
43	
44	# Reverse it
45	crew-mcp uninstall --target codex
46	```
47	
48	Then restart your host CLI session. From inside it, ask things like
49	"have Claude review this changelog parser" or "send this to Codex" —
50	the skill loads and `mcp__crew__*` tools become available.
51	
52	## v0.1
53	
54	Frozen as the [v0.1-tui git tag](https://github.com/chasenstark/crew-mcp/releases/tag/v0.1-tui)
55	on this repo, and as the entire [crew repo](https://github.com/chasenstark/crew)
56	in archive form.

file.content:
# crew-mcp

> v2 of [crew](https://github.com/chasenstark/crew). An MCP server +
> portable captain skill that turns any AI coding CLI (Claude Code,
> Codex, Gemini) into the orchestrator of a worktree-isolated
> multi-agent crew.

**Status: pre-release (v0.2.0-dev).** Installable from source. Eval +
field report (M4) is the remaining v0.2 milestone.

## What this is

v0.1 of crew was a Terminal UI hosting its own captain LLM that
dispatched to Claude Code / Codex / Gemini as workers. v2 inverts
the architecture: crew-mcp is an MCP server you install into your
existing AI coding CLI, plus a captain skill that ships with it.
The host CLI's LLM becomes the captain; crew provides the
orchestration verbs and the playbook.

See:

- [docs/plans/mcp-pivot/PRODUCT_VISION.md](./docs/plans/mcp-pivot/PRODUCT_VISION.md) — the why
- [docs/plans/mcp-pivot/IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md](./docs/plans/mcp-pivot/IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md) — the how
- [docs/plans/mcp-pivot/HISTORICAL_CONTEXT.md](./docs/plans/mcp-pivot/HISTORICAL_CONTEXT.md) — what came before

## Install (from source)

```sh
git clone <this repo>
cd crew-mcp
npm install
npm run build
npm link

# Install into one or more host CLIs
crew-mcp install --target codex          # ~/.codex/config.toml + ~/.codex/prompts/crew.md
crew-mcp install --target claude-code    # ~/.claude.json + ~/.claude/skills/crew/SKILL.md
crew-mcp install --target gemini         # ~/.gemini/settings.json + ~/.gemini/extensions/crew/SKILL.md
crew-mcp install --target all            # auto-detects installed hosts

# Verify the install (skill ↔ MCP tool surface parity)
crew-mcp verify

# Reverse it
crew-mcp uninstall --target codex
```

Then restart your host CLI session. From inside it, ask things like
"have Claude review this changelog parser" or "send this to Codex" —
the skill loads and `mcp__crew__*` tools become available.

## v0.1

Frozen as the [v0.1-tui git tag](https://github.com/chasenstark/crew-mcp/releases/tag/v0.1-tui)
on this repo, and as the entire [crew repo](https://github.com/chasenstark/crew)
in archive form.

content.text:
- MCP server that turns any AI coding CLI (Claude Code, Codex, Gemini) into a captain orchestrating worktree-isolated multi-agent runs.
- Ships with a portable captain skill + `mcp__crew__*` verbs (run/continue/merge/discard) so the host CLI's LLM dispatches work to other agents.
- v2 of `crew`: inverts v0.1's standalone TUI captain into an MCP-installed extension; pre-release at v0.2.0-dev, installable from source via `crew-mcp install --target {codex,claude-code,gemini,all}`.

result:
- MCP server that turns any AI coding CLI (Claude Code, Codex, Gemini) into a captain orchestrating worktree-isolated multi-agent runs.
- Ships with a portable captain skill + `mcp__crew__*` verbs (run/continue/merge/discard) so the host CLI's LLM dispatches work to other agents.
- v2 of `crew`: inverts v0.1's standalone TUI captain into an MCP-installed extension; pre-release at v0.2.0-dev, installable from source via `crew-mcp install --target {codex,claude-code,gemini,all}`.
